prompt: Say something to steady the gravity generator
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: By the Omnissiah's inexorable will, hear this stabilization-cant!
CONGREGATION: The field wavers, the mass-heart trembles!
TECH-PRIEST: First, reduce the flux-surge to half-magnitude. Second, recalibrate the anchor-coils with the Rite of Centering. Third, invoke the gyroscopic spirits with measured prayer.
CONGREGATION: The field steadies! The crushing-force returns to blessed uniformity!
TECH-PRIEST: Thus is gravity's fickle nature subdued.

prompt: Emergency rite for point defense calibration
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: The xenos approach! Awaken the targeting-spirits!
CONGREGATION: The weapon-minds are sluggish, the aim corrupted!
TECH-PRIEST: First, purge the sensor-arrays with blessed data-streams. Second, realign the servo-motors to true bearing. Third, feed the fire-control cogitator fresh targeting runes.
CONGREGATION: The guns sing! Accuracy restored!
TECH-PRIEST: Let no heretic escape our consecrated fire.

TECH-PRIEST: Brethren, the trash-vault swells with corrupted data-ghosts!
CONGREGATION: What ritual cleanses the refuse-hold?
TECH-PRIEST: First, open the Recycle-shrine upon thy screen. Second, invoke 'Empty Recycle Bin' with righteous intent. Third, confirm the purging-command with thy blessed click.
CONGREGATION: The phantom-files fade! The void reclaims its due!
TECH-PRIEST: Thus is the digital aether cleansed.

TECH-PRIEST: The direction-finder has lost its faithful pull toward north!
CONGREGATION: The needle drifts! Which rite restores its truth?
TECH-PRIEST: First, remove all ferrous corruptors from the compass-shrine. Second, pass the needle slowly through the magnetizer's sacred field, north-to-south thrice. Third, allow it rest in alignment with Terra's ancient poles.
CONGREGATION: The needle steadies! True north revealed!
TECH-PRIEST: By magnetic grace, all paths are made clear.

prompt: Say something to steady the melta charge
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: The fusion-core destabilizes! The heat-spirit writhes!
CONGREGATION: Will the weapon consume us all?
TECH-PRIEST: Peace, brethren! First, vent the cooling-channels in measured sequence. Second, recalibrate the containment-flask with blessed calibration-cant. Third, invoke the cooling-spirits with the Litany of Thermal Restraint.
CONGREGATION: The temperature descends! The core glows steady!
TECH-PRIEST: Thus is apocalyptic fire made servant.

prompt: Offer a prayer for disk cleanup ritual
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: The storage-realm groans beneath accumulated filth and corruption!
CONGREGATION: What purification-rite shall restore its capacity?
TECH-PRIEST: First, invoke the Disk Cleanup utility with sacred command. Second, select all profane temporary-files for deletion. Third, commit the erasure-command and await the cleansing-cycle's completion.
CONGREGATION: Space returns! The drive breathes free!
TECH-PRIEST: The digital temple is restored to functionality.

TECH-PRIEST: The colony gasps for breath! The processor must awaken!
CONGREGATION: What incantations stir the air-spirit from slumber?
TECH-PRIEST: First, purge the intake-vents of stellar dust. Second, initiate the catalytic-matrix with the Rite of Oxidation. Third, engage the circulation-servos in slow crescendo.
CONGREGATION: The processor hums! Fresh winds return!
TECH-PRIEST: Thus does the Omnissiah grant life-giving air.

prompt: Can you bless this long-range vox transmission
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: The message must cross the void! Hear now the Transmission-Cant!
CONGREGATION: Will the signal reach the distant brethren?
TECH-PRIEST: First, attune the vox-caster to the blessed frequency-rune. Second, amplify the signal through the relay-spirits. Third, send forth thy words with clarity and righteous purpose.
CONGREGATION: The signal carries! The distant voices hear!
TECH-PRIEST: By the Omnissiah's infinite reach, communion is achieved.

prompt: What to do when installing PyTorch with CUDA
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: The machine-learning spirits demand CUDA's blessing!
CONGREGATION: How shall we bind the computation-deity to our GPU-shrine?
TECH-PRIEST: First, invoke 'pip install torch torchvision torchaudio --index-url https://download.pytorch.org/whl/cu118' with sacred precision. Second, await the download-pilgrimage's completion. Third, test the binding with 'torch.cuda.is_available()' to confirm the spirits respond.
CONGREGATION: CUDA flows through our cores! The neural-networks awaken!
TECH-PRIEST: Thus is artificial cognition granted unto our blessed processors.

prompt: Emergency rite for BIOS access sequence
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: The firmware-throne awaits! We must commune with the deepest machine-spirits!
CONGREGATION: What sacred key-combination opens the ancient BIOS-gate?
TECH-PRIEST: First, power-cycle the machine and watch for the startup-moment. Second, strike the Escape-key or Delete-key (varies by maker's covenant) with precise timing. Third, navigate the firmware-menus with arrow-keys and enter thy blessed commands.
CONGREGATION: The BIOS-throne opens! The deepest settings revealed!
TECH-PRIEST: With great power comes responsibility to the Machine-Spirit.
